title: Create a (bar) chart displaying the "totals" row at the bottom of each Group
excerpt: I want to create a (bar) chart that displays the summary row for each group (the one where you can choose Sum, Average, Count etc.) so on the x axis I want the group name and on the y axis I want the value in the group s…

posts.author: neilpenry (Neil Penry)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to create a (bar) chart that displays the summary row for each group (the one where you can choose Sum, Average, Count etc.) so on the x axis I want the group name and on the y axis I want the value in the group summary “row” for a single column. Is this possible?
